LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-07-2022 HEARING RE: MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL AS TO PLAINTIFF FREDERICK EMERSON JR, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. (AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET FOR OCTOBER 11, FOR WHICH THE PARTY SHOULD BE REPRESENTED.) MOVING PARTY MUST PROVIDE A PROPOSED ORDER ON THE PROPER JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM, WITH ALL APPROPRIATE TEXT FILLED IN AND BOXES MARKED, SHOWING IT TO BE EFFECTIVE AT THE LATER OF (1) OCTOBER 12, 2022 OR (II) THE DATE OF FILING OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE OF THIS SIGNED ORDER UPON THE CLIENT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/CK)

Motion granted. No opposition filed. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION TO PLAINTIFF FREDERICK JAMES EMERSON JR., SET ONE, are deemed admitted.

Order signed.
